use_cases: Selecting baggage allowances during flight booking checkout
Choosing add-on services in product configurators
Picking subscription tiers in pricing flows
Selecting delivery or shipping options at checkout
ai_summary: A minimalist radio-group style option selector component with icon, label, and price display for each option. Built with framer-motion animations and shadcn/ui styling patterns, commonly used in travel and e-commerce checkout flows for selecting add-on services like extra baggage, seat selection, or insurance upgrades.
